name: Ping Pong Shooter
description: Ping Pong Shooter is a fun and addictive puzzle game that combines the classic gameplay of Bubble Shooter with the physics-based gameplay of Ping Pong. The game features a variety of different levels, each with its own unique challenges. As you progress through the game, the levels will become more difficult, requiring you to use your skills and strategy to clear them.
instructions: Desktop Use the right click button of the mouse to shoot the ping pong ball Mobile Click and shoot the ping pong ball Controls and Indicators The scores and levels are shown in the upper middle of the screen
tags: 2D, Bubble Shooter, HTML, HTML5, Shoot, Shooter, Shooting
